C

canLeave() - Method in class goosegame.Cell
abstract method returns true if player can leave cell
canLeave() - Method in class goosegame.cell.GooseCell
player can leave this cell
canLeave() - Method in class goosegame.cell.NormalCell
player can leave this cell
canLeave() - Method in class goosegame.cell.TeleportationCell
player can leave this cell
canLeave() - Method in class goosegame.cell.TrapCell
player can't leave this cell
canLeave() - Method in class goosegame.cell.WaitCell
player can't leave this cell for number of turns
